title: crinum asiaticum var. angustifolium
intro: Crinum asiaticum var. angustifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved crinum lily or snake lily, is a variant of the Crinum asiaticum plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as being used as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
